blocks.text: Personnel expenses can be broken down as follows:
Social security expenses, expenses for post-employment benefits and related employee benefits 552 552
Wages and salaries include expenses relating to restructuring measures and severance
payments of €23 million (2017/18: €19 million). The variable remuneration rose from
€52 million in financial year 2017/18 to €81 million in financial year 2018/19. Wages and
salaries also include expenses for long-term remunerationcomponents totalling €7 million
Annual average number of group employees in the continuing segment:
This includes an absolute number of 16,902 (2017/18: 17,245) part-time employees. The
number of employees working outside of Germany stood at 81,607 (2017/18: 84,425). This
includes 80,660 blue and white collar employees (2017/18: 83,498). In addition, 947
